category_sources: source_facts.description says these are language model tools from CMU Sphinx; official CMUSphinx documentation lists CMUCLMTK development and language model material.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cmuclmtk; official CMUSphinx documentation uses CMUCLMTK for the CMU-Cambridge Language Modeling Toolkit.
docs_sources: Official CMUSphinx documentation has a CMUCLMTK development page and a language model tutorial that references CMUCLMTK.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official CMUSphinx CMUCLMTK development documentation gives the SourceForge SVN checkout URL for trunk/cmuclmtk.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies CMU Sphinx language model tools; source_facts.executables lists language-model utilities such as text2wfreq and idngram2lm.
